primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly, 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
title: QA Fibonacci-Orbit Index Correspondence Cert fixture schema [282]
description: Fixtures for qa_fibonacci_orbit_index_cert_v1. Each fixture specifies a Fibonacci index n, the exact value F_n, and the expected orbit class under mod-9 route enumeration. Class is determined by n mod 12: mul_9 iff 12|n; mul_3_not_9 iff n==4 or 8 mod 12; coprime_to_3 otherwise.
